scripts.build: sh -lc 'if find apps packages -mindepth 2 -maxdepth 2 -name package.json -print -quit | grep -q .; then turbo run build; else echo "No active V2 packages yet."; fi'
scripts.dev: sh -lc 'if find apps packages -mindepth 2 -maxdepth 2 -name package.json -print -quit | grep -q .; then turbo run dev; else echo "No active V2 apps yet."; fi'
scripts.test: sh -lc 'if find apps packages -mindepth 2 -maxdepth 2 -name package.json -print -quit | grep -q .; then turbo run test; else echo "No active V2 packages yet."; fi'
scripts.lint: sh -lc 'if find apps packages -mindepth 2 -maxdepth 2 -name package.json -print -quit | grep -q .; then turbo run lint; else echo "No active V2 packages yet."; fi'
scripts.typecheck: sh -lc 'if find apps packages -mindepth 2 -maxdepth 2 -name package.json -print -quit | grep -q .; then turbo run typecheck; else echo "No active V2 packages yet."; fi'
scripts.clean: sh -lc 'if find apps packages -mindepth 2 -maxdepth 2 -name package.json -print -quit | grep -q .; then turbo run clean; fi; rm -rf node_modules'
